overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit downtown district. The player character moves from covered commercial walkways through dark underpasses and onto busy streets lined with holographic advertisements and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with neon-lit shop fronts

events.description: moving from bright neon shop front into darker underpass area with red ambient lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk past a convenience store with purple neon lighting

notable_agents.action: walking away from camera under the overpass structure

entered.detail: storefront with bright purple neon strip lighting and glass windows
massive curved industrial structure with red neon accents
metal staircase and escalator leading to upper level
thick support columns for the overhead highway structure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked covered walkway lined with neon-lit shops. The camera moves forward past a convenience store with prominent purple lighting on the left, while a massive curved metallic structure dominates the right side. The pavement reflects the neon lights as the player approaches an underpass area.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark underpass beneath highway with red ambient lighting

events.description: passing a food vendor stall emitting bright blue light and steam

agents.ego_description: moving through the dimly lit underpass, passing close to a street vendor

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind a stall with glowing blue light, possibly preparing food

entered.detail: small stall with bright cyan-blue lighting and steam rising from equipment
concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint and tags
elevated pedestrian bridge or highway crossing above the alley

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow, dark underpass illuminated by red emergency lighting. The player passes a food vendor stall glowing with bright cyan light on the right, while graffiti-covered walls line the left. The atmosphere is enclosed and industrial, with concrete pillars supporting the overhead highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional alley opening to main street with palm trees

events.description: emerging from narrow alley into wider street with visible palm trees and open sky

agents.ego_description: exiting the underpass and approaching a main intersection, turning slightly right

entered.detail: tall palm tree visible against the night sky, marking the transition to open street
massive elevated highway ramp with support beams
tall digital advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the dark underpass into a transitional alleyway that opens up to reveal palm trees and the night sky. The environment shifts from enclosed to semi-open as the camera approaches a main intersection, with large digital billboards becoming visible on the surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and heavy neon signage

events.description: stepping onto crosswalk and beginning to cross the multi-lane street
continuing across intersection while cars wait at the traffic signal

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection along with other pedestrians, navigating between traffic lanes

notable_agents.action: red futuristic car stopped at the intersection waiting for pedestrians

entered.detail: zebra-striped pedestrian crossing lines on the wet asphalt
large blue neon sign with Japanese text reading HOテル
prominent red and white neon sign for Marmur Bank
tall vertical screen displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: The player steps onto a wide crosswalk at a busy intersection surrounded by towering buildings covered in neon advertisements. The Marmur Bank sign becomes prominent on the left as pedestrians cross alongside. Futuristic vehicles wait at the traffic lights while holographic billboards illuminate the wet streets with red and blue light.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street sidewalk with dense commercial signage

events.description: futuristic sedan driving past on the street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various storefronts and neon signs, maintaining a steady pace

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in same direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: sleek black and silver vehicles parked along the curb
floating holographic displays projecting product advertisements
row of shops with bright neon signage in various colors

segments.scene_description: Walking along the main street sidewalk, the player passes the prominent Marmur Bank signage while futuristic cars drive past on the right. The street is lined with holographic advertisements and neon-lit storefronts. The dense urban canyon creates an immersive cyberpunk atmosphere with reflections on the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: hotel entrance plaza with stairs and purple accent lighting

events.description: approaching and beginning to ascend the stairs toward the hotel entrance

agents.ego_description: walking toward the hotel entrance and ascending the illuminated stairs

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with purple neon strip lighting on the sides
illuminated sign reading HOTEL with futuristic font
bollards or pillars emitting purple light along the walkway
massive curved screen displaying animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a hotel entrance featuring wide stairs illuminated with purple neon lights. The player moves from the busy street into a more defined plaza area with the hotel signage prominent on the right. Large curved digital billboards tower above as the camera ascends toward the building entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a neon-lit commercial walkway through a claustrophobic underpass and out into a sprawling urban intersection. It begins by gliding past rain-soaked shops and a purple-lit convenience store, moving alongside a massive curved metallic structure as the pavement reflects the surrounding glow. As the camera enters a narrow underpass, the environment shifts to a dark, industrial atmosphere defined by red emergency lighting, graffiti-covered walls, and a cyan-lit food stall. The scene then opens up as the player emerges from the concrete enclosure into a transitional alleyway where palm trees and the night sky become visible. Finally, the view expands toward a main intersection as the camera approaches towering buildings adorned with large digital billboards.

The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked urban canyon that transitions from a bustling intersection into the entrance of a neon-lit hotel. It begins by stepping onto a wide crosswalk where holographic billboards cast red and blue light over wet streets and waiting futuristic vehicles, with the Marmur Bank sign looming on the left. As the camera moves forward along the sidewalk, the scene shifts into a dense corridor of neon-lit storefronts and towering advertisements that reflect vividly off the pavement. The perspective then glides away from the traffic and toward a more defined plaza area, where the lighting shifts toward deep purple hues. Finally, the camera ascends a set of wide, illuminated stairs beneath massive curved digital billboards to reach the hotel entrance.
